prompt: A photorealistic close-up portrait of a {argument name="bird species" default="white cockatoo"} featuring a highly unusual, human-like {argument name="hairstyle" default="blonde comb-over hairstyle swept to the side"}. The bird has pristine white feathers with subtle yellow tinting around the face and neck, a dark grey beak, and a sharp, clear dark eye. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the fine details of the feathers and the surreal, wispy texture of the blonde hair. The background is a {argument name="background" default="soft, out-of-focus natural environment with muted greens and greys"}, creating a shallow depth of field that keeps the focus entirely on the bird's humorous appearance.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实风格的 {argument name="bird species" default="白凤头鹦鹉"} 特写肖像，它留着一种非常独特且类似人类的 {argument name="hairstyle" default="向一侧梳理的金色侧分发型"}。这只鸟拥有洁白的羽毛，面部和颈部带有淡淡的黄色，喙部呈深灰色，眼睛明亮且清晰。光线柔和自然，突显了羽毛的细腻质感以及金色头发那种超现实的蓬松纹理。背景是 {argument name="background" default="柔和且失焦的自然环境，色调为柔和的绿色和灰色"}，浅景深效果使视觉焦点完全集中在鸟儿滑稽的外观上。

breakdown.creativeCore: 梳着侧分头的凤头鹦鹉：生成一张具有幽默感、留着人类发型的鸟类写实肖像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
